essence: Applies scientific methods to analyse evidence and support criminal investigations and legal processes.

identity.title: Forensic Scientist
identity.summary: Processes evidence, conducts laboratory analyses, and provides expert testimony to support investigations and prosecutions.

salary.notes: Specialist forensic disciplines and senior roles attract higher pay.

qualifications: Degree in forensic science, chemistry, biology, or related field
Experience with evidence handling and laboratory techniques
Ability to present findings clearly in court
Attention to chain of custody and quality systems

lifestyle.description: Laboratory and scene work with strict protocols, occasional court appearances, and high standards of documentation.

habits: Liaises with investigators and legal teams
